zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I於1317年出生在英國德比夏爾迪德斯維爾時，他的父親Thomas de Foljambe35歲，母親Alice Darley22歲。他於1342年與Avena de Ireland在英國德比夏爾哈索普結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1351年被列為lord chief justice of ireland。他去世於1376年5月29日在英國德比夏爾貝克韋爾_享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾貝克韋爾_。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I于1317年出生在英国德比夏爾迪德斯維爾时，他的父亲Thomas de Foljambe35岁，母亲Alice Darley22岁。他于1342年与Avena de Ireland在英国德比夏爾哈索普结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1351年被列为lord chief justice of ireland。他去世于1376年5月29日在英国德比夏爾貝克韋爾_享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾貝克韋爾_。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Foljambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French fol ‘foolish, silly’ + jambe ‘leg’, probably a nickname for a lame person, someone with a maimed or crooked leg; compare Belgian . In Old French fol could be used of something useless or of little value, e.g. farine folle ‘mill dust’.

variants.name: Fulljames
meanings: English: variant of Foljambe with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belgian
meanings: Norman, English, Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French bele jambe ‘fine leg’.

nameMeanings.name: Godfrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French name Godefroy, which is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from god ‘god’ (or gōd ‘good’) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This was adopted by the Normans, and brought to England by immigrants from the Low Countries and France. It was borne by a Norman saint ( c.1066–1115 ) who became bishop of Amiens. There has been considerable confusion with Geoffrey .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I was born in 1317, in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, his father, Thomas de Foljambe, was 35 and his mother, Alice Darley, was 22. He married Avena de Ireland in 1342, in Hassop, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. In 1351, at the age of 34, his occupation is listed as lord chief justice of ireland. He died on 29 May 1376, in Bakewell, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Bakewell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I est né en 1317, à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Foljambe, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Darley, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Avena de Ireland en 1342, à Hassop, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. En 1351, à l’âge de 34 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord chief justice of ireland. Il est décédé le 29 mai 1376, à Bakewell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Bakewell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I 1317 in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Foljambe 35 und seine Mutter Alice Darley 22. Er hat 1342 in Hassop, Derbyshire, England Avena de Ireland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1351, als er 34 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord chief justice of ireland aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. Mai 1376 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Bakewell, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Bakewell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I è nato il nel 1317 nel Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Foljambe, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Alice Darley, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Avena de Ireland nel 1342, nel Hassop, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1351, all'età di 34 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord chief justice of ireland. Morì il 29 maggio 1376, nel Bakewell, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Godfrey de Foljambe Iが1317年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルで生まれた時，父Thomas de Foljambeは35歳，母Alice Darleyは22歳であった。1342年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハソップでAvena de Irelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1351年，34歳の時，職業はlord chief justice of irelandと記録されている。彼は1376年5月29日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアベイケウエルで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアベイケウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I(이)가 1317년 영국 더비실르 티데스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Foljambe(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Darley(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1342년 영국 더비실르 하소프에서 Avena de Ireland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1351년, 34세의 나이로 그의 직업은 lord chief justice of ireland이었다. 그는 1376년 5월 29일 영국 더비실르 베이케웰에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 베이케웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I nasceu em 1317, em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Foljambe, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice Darley, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Avena de Ireland em 1342, em Hassop, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1351, com 34 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord chief justice of ireland. Ele faleceu em 29 de maio de 1376, em Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Cubley, Uttoxeter, Derbyshire, England: Little Cubley, Derbyshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I родился в 1317 г. в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Foljambe было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Darley, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Avena de Ireland в 1342 г. в местности хассоп, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1351 году, в возрасте 34 лет,  он работал по профессии lord chief justice of ireland. Он умер 29 мая 1376 г. в местности беикюелл, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности беикюелл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I nació en 1317, en Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Foljambe, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alice Darley, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Avena de Ireland en 1342, en Hassop, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1351, a la edad de 34 años, su ocupación registrada era lord chief justice of ireland. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1376, en Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
